Document:
# Energy Weapons
Energy Weapons use laser technology to deal precise, high-penetration damage. They are quieter than conventional firearms and do not use traditional ammunition — instead relying on [color=#a4885c]energy cells[/color] and [color=#a4885c]microfusion cells[/color].
Energy weapons are typically rare and expensive, often in the hands of the Brotherhood of Steel, the Enclave, or well-equipped traders.
## Laser Pistols
Compact laser sidearms, useful for both self-defense and long-range precision work.
## Laser Rifles
Laser rifles deal reliable damage at range and are standard issue for the Brotherhood of Steel.
## Gatling Laser
The Gatling Laser is an extremely high-rate-of-fire energy weapon, capable of laying down a devastating stream of laser fire.
## Improvised Energy Weapons
Makeshift and crude laser weapons can be constructed from salvaged parts, though they are less reliable than pre-war models.
